title: The Adventures of Biffle and Shooster
original_title: The Adventures of Biffle and Shooster
overview: Feature compilation of four Biffle and Shooster comedy shorts--"The Biffle Murder Case," "Imitation of Wife," "Schmo Boat" and "Bride of Finklestein"--plus five additional songs and sketches.
